title: Escape From the Chateau
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Chiffon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Judge, Unknown person #4 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you all right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Give me a hand here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: - The Chateau became 'A Cake and is Collapsing...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought I was going to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to be crushed by the cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear voices from over there too! Pull them out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?! Wait a minute!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How'd the Tea Party Become Like This - Chocolate?!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The straw hats did this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, it's awful!! Both the wedding ceremony and the wedding cake are ruined!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were prevented from assessing the Vinsmoke family...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And on top of that, Bege betrayed us and plotted to Assassinate Mama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: bege, you bastard....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "And I even thought highly of your ability- noir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But that explosion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Charlotte family eldest daughter

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything about it is still a Mys- tery, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If one of the people who were up on the rooftop with us did it, they'd be suicidal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The chance of that is low.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... but one mystery has been solved- moule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is, during the time of the tea party...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All methods of communication to the Hall were cut off-bon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It probably wasn't the doing of Bege's group.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Was there anything that should have been comuni-cated?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's...!! During the tea party, the sun pirates who were based on the eastern bay...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's right! Those bastards ran away- Gaoh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Pekoms!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of the fishman pirates gathered their belongings and ran!!...what exactly were they...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Jinbe, he...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: left and joined the straw hat crew!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's right...it was probably for that reason.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's clear that jinbe with- drew from the crew in front of Mama,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that she would go into a fiery* rage, signaling to his crew for them to run.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just like jinbe to think of such a meticulous plan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Katakuri! Our squads have headed in the direction of the straw hats and bege!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: A separate squad is already invading germa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Good... Brolee...come with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Of course, Brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Won't you kill the straw hats for me!!? They're unforgettable!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They used me for all those awful things... hhmmmphhhhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...that's what I plan to do...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will take straw hat Luffy's head myself....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have to kill him before he becomes an existence...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: that will seriously threaten mama.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Everyone, get away from the town!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Smoothie (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Get as far away as you can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is it, at a time like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's the matter, sister smoothie!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Run away, Mont-D'Or!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No way... at a time like this...!?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 51 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
